---
title: "Advisor Working Session: April 15, 2026"
date: "2026-04-14"
categories:
  - 1v1
  - Working Session
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
    code-fold: true
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Agenda

------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  Updates

    1.  Shifting 4/21 meeting (1030-1130) to Wednesday or Thursday of the same week

    2.  Biomarker Manuscript

    3.  Plan for Methylation Manuscript completion NLT June 10, 2026

    4.  Committee email re: status update

2.  Methylation Analysis Resources

3.  Today's Goals for Working Session

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Updates: 1.1 - Shift April 21st Working Session

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> Due to a scheduling conflict with boat transportation from Yellow to the ferry, the current time of 10:30 am - 11:30 am on 4/21 will not work. Can we shift to any of the following:
>
> Wednesday, April 22nd at or after 1:00 pm
>
> Thursday, April 23rd between 10:30a - 2:00 pm

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Updates: 1.2 - Biomarker Manuscript Draft

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> The correct link to the draft and visualizations is here. I shifted from personal Google Drive to UW Google Drive.
>
> Status: Need to review current draft and request edits.
>
> Deadline: April 17th.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Updates 1.3: Mussel Methylation Manuscript Weekly Plan

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> Current project status: Moving into methylKit analysis prior to annotation and enrichment.
>
> Week of April 12th:
>
> Week of April 19th:
>
> Week of April 26th:
>
> Week of May 3rd:
>
> Week of May 10th:
>
> Week of May 17th:
>
> Week of May 24th:
>
> Week of May 31st:
>
> Week of June 10th:

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Updates 1.4: Committee Update Email

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> Here is the draft of the status update for the committee.
>
> Goal is to send out today (April 15th) with the biomarker draft attached.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Item 2: Methylation Analysis Resources

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> Here are the links to:
>
> -   Repo
>
> -   Gannet
>
> -   Progress Log
>
> -   Questions

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Item 4: Goals for Today

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> My goals for today's working session are:
>
> 1\.
>
> 2\.
>
> 3\.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Goals for next week

------------------------------------------------------------------------

> Prior to next week's working session:
